package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_gorm_preload_all_associations: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag GORM Preload of broad association sets on list endpoints.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule535NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario535Negative(records []Rule535NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
